Localization.Description: A CA certificate has been exported, which can be used to issue valid certificates to any user without knowing their password. This allows an attacker to completely compromise the domain

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: CA certificate "{object.name}" has been exported from certification server {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from IP address {src.ip} remotely exported CA certificate "{object.name}" from certification server {event_src.host}
